title: Reticulocyte Count: MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:
our count for a short time if you move to a place with a high altitude. The count should return to normal once your body gets used to the lower oxygen levels that happen in higher altitudes. 
Some medicines may increase or decrease your reticulocyte count. 
If you have questions about your results or your child's results, talk to your health care provider.
Learn more about laboratory tests, reference ranges, and understanding results .
